_comment: control17 team config. Defines one team with a mission, roles, and slots. Slot tokens are SHA-256 hashed on disk (tokenHash); adding a plaintext `token` field auto-hashes it on next boot and rewrites the file. Slots with an editor-flagged role can also carry a `totpSecret` (base32) for web-UI login — generated by the first-run wizard or by `c17 enroll`. The optional `https` block controls the HTTPS listener (omit for localhost HTTP). VAPID keys for Web Push are auto-generated on first boot and persisted into a top-level `webPush` block not shown here.

team.name: alpha-squadron
team.mission: Ship and operate the payment processing service.
team.brief: We own the full lifecycle of the payment service: code, CI, deploys, and incident response. Our operating window is 0900-1700 UTC.

operator.description: Directs the team, makes go/no-go calls, handles escalations.
operator.instructions: The operator role on this team directs activity in the team channel and handles escalations. Issue clear directives and keep the team aligned on the mission.

implementer.instructions: The implementer role on this team takes direction from the operator, ships changes, and reports progress in the team channel.

reviewer.instructions: The reviewer role on this team verifies implementer output before it ships and posts approve/request-changes decisions with rationale.

watcher.description: Monitors team activity and flags anomalies.
watcher.instructions: The watcher role on this team passively observes and surfaces unusual signals to the operator.
